Berserk.description: 1/day, go berserk: immune to damage for 3 rounds.
Berserk.name: Berserk

Charge.description: 3/day, you can charge into combat by moving at least near before attacking. Each time you do this, your melee attacks deal double damage that round.
Charge.name: Charge

Demonic Possession.description:
3/day, gain a +1 bonus to your damage rolls that lasts 3 rounds.

In addition, add half your level to the damage bonus (round down).
Demonic Possession.name: Demonic Possession

Fascinate.description: (Focus). You transfix all chosen targets of level 4 or less within near.
Fascinate.name: Fascinate

Flourish.description: 3/day, regain [[/roll 1d6]] hit points when you hit an enemy with a melee attack.
Flourish.name: Flourish

Foebane.description: @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.gear.Item.FeoRamUTz5jakMJ8]{Foebane} ADV on attacks and damage against one creature type you choose for [[/r 1d6]] rounds
Foebane.name: Foebane

Hide from Creature.description: 1/day, choose a creature of LV 9 or less you can see; it must pass a [[check 15 wis]] check or it can't see or hear you for 1d4 rounds.
Hide from Creature.name: Hide from Creature

Ignore All Damage.description: 1/day, ignore all damage and effects from one attack.
Ignore All Damage.name: Ignore All Damage

Inspire.description: One target in near gains a luck token.
Inspire.name: Inspire

Omen.description: 3/day, you can make a [[check 9 wis]] check. On a success, gain a luck token (you can't have more than one luck token at a time).
Omen.name: Omen

Paralyze a Target.description: 1/day, paralyze a target of LV 9 or less you damage with a weapon for 1d4 rounds.
Paralyze a Target.name: Paralyze a Target

Petrifying Gaze.description:
One creature of your level or less that meets your gaze must pass a DC 15 CON check or be petrified for 1d4 rounds. It still takes damage as normal while petrified.

You can use this talent a number of times per day equal to your CON modifier (minimum 1).
Petrifying Gaze.name: Petrifying Gaze

Relentless.description: 3/day, when you are reduced to 0 HP, make a [[check 18 con]] check (the Implacable talent applies to this roll). On a success, you instead go to 1 HP.
Relentless.name: Relentless

Sleep a Creature.description: 1/day, choose a living creature of LV 5 or less you can see within near; it must pass a [[check 15 con]] check or fall asleep.
Sleep a Creature.name: Sleep a Creature

Smoke Step.description: 3/day, teleport to a location you can see within near. This does not use your action.
Smoke Step.name: Smoke Step

Stimulant.description: @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.gear.Item.dBQr9YPyhvwyPm0g]{Stimulant} You can't be surprised for 10 rounds
Stimulant.name: Stimulant

Teleport to Familiar.description:
1/day, teleport to your familiar's location as a move

duplicate = +1 use per day
Teleport to Familiar.name: Teleport to Familiar

Walk on Sheer Surfaces.description: 1/day, you can walk on sheer surfaces like walls for 1d4 rds.
Walk on Sheer Surfaces.name: Walk on Sheer Surfaces

Walk on Water.description: 1/day, you can walk on water as if it were solid for 1d4 rds.
Walk on Water.name: Walk on Water
